title: Implement Fully Functional Realtime Visitor Statistics System

requirements.text: Create backend data structures for visitor tracking: visits table with fields (id, session_id, ip_address, user_agent, page_url, referrer, device_type, browser, visited_at) and visitor_sessions table with fields (session_id, ip_address, first_visit, last_activity, is_online). Ensure all timestamp fields use Int (nanoseconds since epoch) for compatibility with Internet Computer.
acceptanceCriteria: visits and visitor_sessions data structures defined in backend/main.mo
All timestamp fields use Int type representing nanoseconds
session_id is indexed/optimized for lookups

requirements.text: Implement trackVisitor() backend function that accepts session_id, ip_address, user_agent, page_url, referrer, device_type, and browser parameters. Function must insert a new visit record, create or update visitor_sessions entry, set last_activity to current timestamp, and mark is_online as true.
acceptanceCriteria: trackVisitor() function implemented in backend/main.mo
Function creates new visit record with all provided parameters
Function updates or creates visitor_sessions with current timestamp
is_online flag set to true on activity

requirements.text: Implement cleanupExpiredSessions() backend function that identifies visitor_sessions with last_activity older than 5 minutes and sets is_online to false for those sessions.

quotes: Set is_online = false if last_activity older than 5 minutes

acceptanceCriteria: cleanupExpiredSessions() function implemented
Function checks last_activity timestamps against current time minus 5 minutes
Sessions older than threshold have is_online set to false

requirements.text: Implement statistics calculation backend functions: getTotalVisitors() counting distinct session_ids from visitor_sessions, getTodayVisitors() filtering by first_visit date equal to current date, getYesterdayVisitors() filtering by first_visit date equal to yesterday, getWeeklyVisitors() filtering by current week, getMonthlyVisitors() filtering by current month and year, getYearlyVisitors() filtering by current year. All functions must return accurate numeric Nat values.
acceptanceCriteria: All six visitor count functions implemented in backend/main.mo
Functions use DISTINCT session_id counting logic
Date filtering correctly identifies today, yesterday, week, month, and year boundaries
All functions return Nat type

requirements.text: Implement getOnlineUsers() backend function that counts visitor_sessions with last_activity within the last 5 minutes and is_online set to true, returning the count as Nat.
acceptanceCriteria: getOnlineUsers() function implemented
Function filters by last_activity within 5 minutes
Function filters by is_online = true
Returns Nat count

requirements.text: Implement page view tracking functions: getTotalPageViews() returning total count of visits, getPageViewsByUrl() returning array of tuples with page_url and visit count sorted by count descending, and getVisitorTrendLast30Days() returning daily visitor counts for the last 30 days as an array of tuples (date, count).
acceptanceCriteria: getTotalPageViews() returns total visit count
getPageViewsByUrl() groups by page_url and returns sorted results
getVisitorTrendLast30Days() returns daily aggregated data for 30 days
All functions return appropriate data types

requirements.text: Update getVisitorStats() backend method to return comprehensive statistics object with fields: totalVisitors, todayVisitors, yesterdayVisitors, weeklyVisitors, monthlyVisitors, yearlyVisitors, onlineUsers, and totalPageViews. Call the respective calculation functions to populate these fields with real data.

quotes: All statistic cards must display real data

acceptanceCriteria: getVisitorStats() method updated to call all statistics functions
Method returns object with all required numeric fields
No hardcoded zero values; all values derived from actual data

requirements.text: Implement frontend tracking middleware that automatically executes on every public page load (excluding admin routes). Generate or retrieve session_id from sessionStorage, detect device_type and browser from user agent, capture current page URL and referrer, then call backend trackVisitor() with all collected data. Exclude known bot user agents from tracking.

quotes: AUTO EXECUTE ON EVERY PAGE LOAD

acceptanceCriteria: Tracking logic executes automatically on public page renders
session_id persisted in sessionStorage and reused across pages
device_type and browser detected from navigator.userAgent
Admin routes (/admin/*) excluded from tracking
Bot user agents filtered out before calling backend

requirements.text: Update frontend VisitorStatsPage (frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPage.tsx) to fetch and display realtime statistics including Total Visitors, Today, Yesterday, Weekly, Monthly, Yearly, Online Users, and Total Page Views using the updated backend getVisitorStats() method. Implement auto-refresh every 15 seconds using React Query refetchInterval.

quotes: Display: Total Visitors, Today, Yesterday, Weekly, Monthly, Yearly, Online Users, Total Page Views

acceptanceCriteria: VisitorStatsPage displays all 8 statistic values from backend
Statistics auto-refresh every 15 seconds via React Query
No hardcoded dummy data displayed
Loading states shown during fetch

requirements.text: Add line chart to VisitorStatsPage showing visitor trend for last 30 days by calling backend getVisitorTrendLast30Days() method and rendering with a charting library. Add bar chart showing top 10 most visited pages by calling backend getPageViewsByUrl() and displaying the top 10 results.
acceptanceCriteria: Line chart renders 30-day visitor trend data
Bar chart renders top 10 pages by view count
Charts update on data refresh
Charts handle empty data gracefully

requirements.text: Update useVisitorStats hook (frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts) to remove any stubbed/placeholder logic and ensure it properly calls the backend actor's getVisitorStats method, returning the actual statistics data structure with all numeric fields.

quotes: All endpoints must be protected by admin authentication middleware

acceptanceCriteria: useVisitorStats hook calls backend getVisitorStats method
Hook returns actual backend data without modification
Error handling implemented for failed requests

requirements.text: Implement periodic cleanup job that calls cleanupExpiredSessions() every 5 minutes to maintain accurate online user counts by marking inactive sessions as offline.

quotes: Set is_online = false if last_activity older than 5 minutes

acceptanceCriteria: Cleanup function called automatically every 5 minutes
Expired sessions marked as offline
Online user count remains accurate

constraints: Use Internet Computer's Int type (nanoseconds since epoch) for all timestamp fields, not Unix seconds
Do not use external databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, etc.); all data must persist in Motoko stable storage
Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or any files in frontend/src/components/ui
All admin statistics endpoints must verify admin authentication before returning data
Tracking must not create performance bottlenecks; optimize for high-frequency page load scenarios
nonGoals: Advanced analytics like user journeys or conversion funnels
Third-party analytics integrations (Google Analytics, Mixpanel, etc.)
GDPR compliance features like data export or right-to-be-forgotten
